body:
This PR removes truncated `show` for Fields, now that Julia 1.10 has depth-limited stack trace printing (https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/pull/49795).

This should (finally) fix the majority of method invalidations for `show(io::IO, ::Type)`.

@simonbyrne, should we leave this but put it inside a `if VERSION ≤ v"1.10"` if-block to preserve backward functionality?

Closes #1237.
title: Remove truncated show for Fields
